message: Docs: Split server hosting from getting started

files.patch:
@@ -115,7 +115,7 @@ npx agentlogs status
 
 See the full [CLI reference](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/cli/commands).
 
-## Self-Hosting
+## Hosting
 
 AgentLogs is source-available and can be self-hosted.
 
@@ -124,7 +124,7 @@ You can deploy it either as:
 - A container from `ghcr.io/agentlogs/agentlogs`
 - A standalone `agentlogs-server` binary from GitHub Releases
 
-See the full guide at [Self-Hosting Docs](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/introduction/self-hosting).
+See the full guide at [Hosting Docs](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/server/hosting).
 
 ### Prerequisites

@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ description: "Product updates and announcements"
 - AgentLogs server is no longer tied to Cloudflare-specific infrastructure
 - Self-hosting now runs as a single standalone binary or Docker image (`ghcr.io/agentlogs/agentlogs`)
 - On-prem deployment is now much simpler
-- See the new [Self-Hosting guide](/introduction/self-hosting)
+- See the new [Hosting guide](/server/hosting)
 </Update>
 
 <Update label="February 8, 2026">

@@ -1,9 +1,21 @@
 ---
 title: Getting Started
-description: Choose your AI coding assistant to get started with AgentLogs
+description: Set up your server, then choose your AI coding assistant
 ---
 
-Select your AI coding assistant below to set up AgentLogs:
+## 1. Set Up Your Server
+
+If you're using AgentLogs Cloud, you can skip this step and jump straight to your coding agent below.
+
+If you're hosting AgentLogs yourself, start with the Hosting guide so your server is running and you have a hostname ready for `npx agentlogs login`.
+
+<Card title="Hosting" href="/server/hosting" horizontal>
+  Deploy AgentLogs with Docker or the standalone binary
+</Card>
+
+## 2. Choose Your Coding Agent
+
+Select your AI coding assistant below to finish setting up AgentLogs:
 
 <Card title="Claude Code" icon="/icons/claude-code.svg" href="/agents/claude-code" horizontal>
   Anthropic's CLI for Claude

@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
 ---
-title: Self-Hosting
+title: Hosting
 description: Deploy AgentLogs with the official GHCR image or standalone binary
 ---
 
-# Self-Hosting AgentLogs
+# Hosting AgentLogs
 
 AgentLogs server is distributed in two production-ready formats:
 
@@ -83,7 +83,7 @@ Authenticate your CLI against your host:
 npx agentlogs login logs.example.com
 ```
 
-Use your public hostname (without `https://`) so your local CLI/plugins upload to your self-hosted instance.
+Use your public hostname (without `https://`) so your local CLI/plugins upload to your own instance.
 
 ## 5. Upgrade
